posts.author: Ggarcia (Gloria García)
posts.cookedHtml:
we have the following customer request:
Our mobile phones that are enrolled under an mdm
and access to Azure is through a compliant policy.
and for that, the applications have to be compatible with said policy. to do it… should they be able to use the microsoft libraries called “ADAL”. do you know if this will be possible with monday app?
